# Schema Reference

## Postgres: `legislation_text`

Hub provision store — one row per structural unit of legal text.

**188,333 rows** | 67 columns

| Column | Type | Nullable |
|--------|------|----------|
| `law_name` | `TEXT` | no |
| `section_id` | `TEXT` | no |
| `sort_key` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `position` | `INTEGER` | yes |

### Indexes

```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_lt_drrp_types ON public.legislation_text USING gin (drrp_types)
CREATE INDEX idx_lt_embedding ON public.legislation_text USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (m='16', ef_construction='100')
CREATE INDEX idx_lt_extraction_method ON public.legislation_text USING btree (extraction_method)
CREATE INDEX idx_lt_law_name ON public.legislation_text USING btree (law_name)
CREATE INDEX idx_lt_scope ON public.legislation_text USING btree (scope)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX legislation_text_pkey ON public.legislation_text USING btree (section_id)
```

## Postgres: `provision_actors`

Per-provision actor classifications with per-tier signal columns.

**125,544 rows** | 26 columns

| Column | Type | Nullable |
|--------|------|----------|
| `section_id` | `TEXT` | no |
| `actor_label` | `TEXT` | no |
| `actor_category` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `regex_drrp` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `regex_position` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `cls_drrp` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `cls_position` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `cls_confidence` | `REAL` | yes |
| `llm_drrp` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `llm_position` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `drrp` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `position` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `extraction_method` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `inferred_drrp` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `inferred_position` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `dep_is_subject` | `REAL` | yes |
| `dep_is_object` | `REAL` | yes |
| `dep_is_agent` | `REAL` | yes |
| `dep_is_attr` | `REAL` | yes |
| `dep_voice_passive` | `REAL` | yes |
| `dep_has_modal` | `REAL` | yes |
| `dep_verb_distance` | `REAL` | yes |
| `reconcile_confidence` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `slm_drrp` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `slm_position` | `TEXT` | yes |
| `slm_confidence` | `REAL` | yes |

### Indexes

```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_pa_section ON public.provision_actors USING btree (section_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX provision_actors_pkey ON public.provision_actors USING btree (section_id, actor_label)
```

## Data Flow

```
Sertantai ──(LAT provision text)──→ Postgres (legislation_text)
                                        │
                                        ▼
                                   DRRP pipeline
                                   (parse → classify → reconcile → backfill)
                                        │
                                        ▼
                              DuckDB (legislation) ←── law-level aggregates
                                        │
                                        ▼
                              Zenoh publish → Sertantai
```

## Regenerating This Document

```bash
# Requires Postgres running on port 5433
python3 scripts/maintenance/schema_docs.py
```

See `docs/architecture/README.md` for details.
